term: Can I buy you a drink?
Would you like to dance with me?
Do you want to go out with me?
Could I have your phone number?
If kissing you were a sin, I'd walk happily through hell.
definition: Si besarte fuera pecado, caminaría feliz por el infierno.

term: If only half the stars shone as brightly as your eyes.
definition: Ojalá la mitad de las estrellas brillaran tanto como tus ojos.

term: Are you lost? Heaven is a long way from here.
definition: ¿Te has perdido? Porque el cielo está bien lejos de aquí.

term: If beauty were a crime, I'd give you life in prison.
definition: Si la belleza fuera delito, yo te hubiera dado cadena perpetua.

term: Hello, I'm a thief here to steal your heart.
definition: Hola, soy un ladrón, y estoy aquí para robar tu corazón.

term: I'd like to be a contact lens so you couldn't take your eyes off me.
definition: Me gustaría ser lente de contacto para que no pudieras sacarme de tu mirada.

term: If water were beauty, you'd be the whole ocean.
definition: Si el agua fuese belleza, tú serías el océano entero.

term: If I were a flight attendant I'd carry you on my plane; since I'm not, I carry you in my heart.
definition: Si yo fuera azafata, te llevaría en mi avión, pero como no lo soy, te llevo en mi corazón.

term: Do you believe in love at first sight, or should I walk by again?
definition: ¿Crees en amor a primera vista, o debo pasar otra vez?

term: If only you were a firefighter to put out the fire of my desire.
definition: Ojalá fueras bombero para apagar el fuego de mi deseo.
